files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/health.py b/app/api/routes/health.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/health.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/health.py
@@ -7,12 +7,16 @@
 from __future__ import annotations
 
 import httpx
+import time
+from datetime import datetime
 
 from fastapi import APIRouter
 
 from app.core.config import get_settings
 from app.core.logging import get_logger
 from app.rag.vector_store import ChromaStore
+
+START_TIME = time.time()
 
 logger = get_logger(__name__)
 router = APIRouter(prefix="/api/health", tags=["health"])
@@ -47,11 +51,14 @@
         logger.warning("ChromaDB health check failed: %s", exc)
 
     status = "ok" if (ollama_ok and chroma_ok) else "degraded"
+    uptime_seconds = int(time.time() - START_TIME)
+    
     return {
         "status": status,
         "ollama": ollama_ok,
         "chromadb": chroma_ok,
         "llm_model": settings.OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL,
         "embed_model": settings.OLLAMA_EMBED_MODEL,
+        "uptime": f"{uptime_seconds}s",
+        "server_time": datetime.now().isoformat(),
     }

scenarios.title: Health check returns ok status when all dependencies are healthy
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health returns status 'ok' and all dependency flags are true when both Ollama and ChromaDB are operational.
preconditions: Ollama server is running and accessible at configured OLLAMA_BASE_URL
ChromaDB is initialized and responding
Settings have valid OLLAMA_LLM_MODEL configured
scenarios.expected_result: Response contains status='ok', ollama=true, chromadb=true, and correct llm_model value.

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded status when Ollama is unreachable
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health returns status 'degraded' and ollama=false when the Ollama HTTP API is not reachable.
preconditions: Ollama server is stopped or OLLAMA_BASE_URL is misconfigured
ChromaDB is operational

steps.assertion: status equals 'degraded' and ollama equals false

scenarios.expected_result: Response returns 200 with status='degraded', ollama=false, chromadb=true. Warning logged about Ollama health check failure.

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded status when ChromaDB fails to initialize
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health returns status 'degraded' and chromadb=false when ChromaStore initialization or count() fails.
preconditions: Ollama is operational
ChromaDB connection fails or collection is inaccessible

steps.assertion: status equals 'degraded' and chromadb equals false

scenarios.expected_result: Response returns 200 with status='degraded', ollama=true, chromadb=false. Warning logged about ChromaDB health check failure.

scenarios.title: Health check returns degraded when both dependencies fail
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health gracefully handles scenario where both Ollama and ChromaDB are unavailable.
preconditions: Ollama server is unreachable
ChromaDB is unreachable or misconfigured

steps.assertion: status equals 'degraded' and both dependency flags false

scenarios.expected_result: Response returns 200 with status='degraded', ollama=false, chromadb=false. Both warning logs recorded.

scenarios.title: Health check handles Ollama timeout gracefully
scenarios.description: Verify that the health check does not hang and returns degraded when Ollama response exceeds the 3.0 second timeout.
preconditions: Ollama server responds but with latency > 3.0 seconds
ChromaDB is operational

steps.assertion: ollama equals false due to timeout

scenarios.expected_result: Health check completes within reasonable time, returns degraded with ollama=false. Timeout exception logged as warning.

scenarios.title: Health check handles concurrent requests correctly
scenarios.description: Verify that multiple simultaneous health check requests are handled without race conditions or resource exhaustion.
preconditions: Server is running
Both Ollama and ChromaDB are operational

steps.assertion: all responses have identical status values

scenarios.expected_result: All 10 concurrent requests return 200 with consistent health status payload. No connection pool exhaustion errors.

scenarios.title: Health check with Ollama returning non-200 status
scenarios.description: Verify health check treats Ollama 4xx/5xx responses as unhealthy, not as connectivity success.
preconditions: Ollama server responds to GET /api/tags with status 500 or 404
ChromaDB is operational
scenarios.expected_result: Health check returns ollama=false and status='degraded' even though Ollama server is reachable but returned error status.

scenarios.title: Health check does not expose sensitive configuration values
scenarios.description: Verify that GET /api/health response does not leak sensitive settings like API keys, database credentials, or internal URLs.
preconditions: Application has sensitive configs in settings (e.g., database passwords, API keys)

steps.assertion: OLLAMA_BASE_URL is not exposed in response
only llm_model model name is returned, not full settings

scenarios.expected_result: Health check response contains only non-sensitive fields: status, ollama, chromadb, llm_model. No secrets or internal URLs exposed.

scenarios.title: Health check accessible without authentication for readiness probe
scenarios.description: Verify that the health endpoint is intentionally public for Kubernetes/Docker readiness probes without requiring auth headers.
preconditions: Application has authentication middleware configured for other endpoints

steps.assertion: response contains valid health status payload

scenarios.expected_result: Health endpoint returns 200 without authentication. This is expected behavior for readiness/liveness probes.

scenarios.title: Health check verifies correct Ollama endpoint path
scenarios.description: Verify that health check calls the correct Ollama API endpoint GET /api/tags to validate connectivity.
preconditions: Ollama server is running at configured OLLAMA_BASE_URL
Test proxy/capture is available to inspect outbound requests

steps.assertion: health check made request to /api/tags endpoint

scenarios.expected_result: Health check makes HTTP GET request to {OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/tags with 3.0 second timeout.

scenarios.title: Health check handles malformed Ollama response gracefully
scenarios.description: Verify health check does not crash when Ollama returns unexpected response body that cannot be parsed.
preconditions: Ollama server returns 200 but with malformed JSON body
ChromaDB is operational
scenarios.expected_result: Health check returns ollama=true because status code is 200, regardless of response body content. Response parsing is not attempted on status check.

scenarios.title: Health check logs warning on dependency failures without stack traces
scenarios.description: Verify that when dependencies fail, warning logs are produced without exposing stack traces or sensitive error details.
preconditions: Ollama or ChromaDB is configured to fail
Log capture is available

steps.assertion: no stack trace in log output
log message sanitized, no sensitive URL credentials exposed

scenarios.expected_result: Warning log is emitted with sanitized error message. No stack traces or sensitive connection details in logs.
